sections.paragraph:
m. lean, used of a person, Eze 34:20 of soil, Num 13:20.

I. רָזֹון m. (from the root רָזָה), leanness, hence pining, phthisis, Isa 10:16 Psa 106:15. Mic 6:10, אֵיפַת־רָזֹון “a lean ephah,” i.e. less than it ought to be.

II. רָזֹון (from the root רָזַן), i.q. רֹזֵן (of the form עָשֹׁוק=עשֵׁק), a prince, Pro 14:28.
